LAW AND MOTION 301, NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO VACATE AND SET ASIDE DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 28, 2011 FOR PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF ITS MOVING PAPERS INCLUDING PROOF OF SERVICE TO DEPARTMENT 301 NO LATER THAN JUNE 22. SEE LOCAL RULE 2.6(B). COURTESY COPIES SHALL REFLECT THE NEW HEARING DATE. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER, CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
MINI-MINUTES FOR JUN-28-2011 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $409.50 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT AGUILAR, MICHAEL P.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT ISSUED TO PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA

LAW AND MOTION 301, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA'S MOTION TO SE T ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS OFF CALENDAR FOR INSUFFICIENT NOTICE. LATEST DATE FOR SERVICE BY MAIL FOR MAY 4 HEARING WAS APRIL 7 AND SUCH SERVICE DID NOT TAKE PLACE UNTIL APRIL 8. SEE CCP 1005 (B). THE COURT'S CONTINUANCE OF THE HEARING TO MAY 12 FOR MOVING PARTY'S FAILURE TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF ITS PAPERS DOES NOT CURE THIS DEFICIENCY. JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR # 8189 301/PJB
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOUSEHOLD FINANCE CORPORATION OF CALIFORNIA SERVED FEB-01-2010, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT AGUILAR, MICHAEL P.
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10
